options.name: -all
options.description: Removes all physically exclusive, logically exclusive, or asynchronous clock groups in the design

options.name: -asynchronous
options.description: Asynchronous clock groups to be removed

options.name: -logically_exclusive
options.description: Logically exclusive clock groups to be removed

options.name: -name
options.description: Previously defined names of clock groups to be removed

options.name: -physically_exclusive
options.description: All physically exclusive clock groups to be removed
